project.description: Path to the ng-package.json configuration file relative to project root. This file contains ng-packagr configuration including the entry file path and output destination. Example: './ng-package.json' or './dist/ng-package.json'

tsConfig.description: Path to the TypeScript configuration file relative to project root. This tsconfig will be used by ng-packagr for Angular compilation. Should typically extend ng-packagr's base tsconfig. If not specified, defaults to './tsconfig.lib.json'

outputPath.description: Output directory path relative to project root where the built library will be written. Contains compiled JavaScript, type definitions, and package metadata. If not specified, uses the 'dest' value from ng-package.json configuration.
